data.title: Take and Give Needs Secures Prime Market Listing Compliance
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Take and Give. Needs Co., Ltd. ( (JP:4331) ) has issued an announcement.

Take and Give Needs Co., Ltd. announced it has met the continued listing criteria for the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime Market as of May 13, 2025. The company addressed a previous non-compliance issue related to the market capitalization of tradable shares by ensuring trading activity and adjusting its base date, thereby securing its position on the Prime Market and committing to enhancing corporate value.

More about Take and Give. Needs Co., Ltd.

Take and Give Needs Co., Ltd. operates in the financial sector, focusing on maintaining its listing on the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime Market. The company is involved in managing its shares and ensuring compliance with market regulations.

An update from Grange Resources Limited ( (AU:GRR) ) is now available.

Juventus Football Club Spa ( (IT:JUVE) ) has provided an update.

data.title: Biocytogen Secures Japan Patent for RenMab Platform, Strengthening Global IP Strategy
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Biocytogen Pharmaceuticals (Beijing) Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2315) ).

Biocytogen Pharmaceuticals has secured a patent in Japan for its RenMab™ fully human antibody mouse platform, marking a significant milestone in its global intellectual property strategy. This achievement enhances the company’s competitive edge in the biotech industry, as the RenMice platform has already generated numerous licensing agreements and high-potential therapeutic candidates, underscoring its substantial commercial value and global recognition.

More about Biocytogen Pharmaceuticals (Beijing) Co. Ltd. Class H

Biocytogen Pharmaceuticals (Beijing) Co., Ltd. is a company in the biotech and biopharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of fully human antibody discovery platforms. Their primary products include the RenMice platform series, which is recognized for its ability to discover fully human antibodies and TCRs with low immunogenicity and high diversity. The company has established licensing agreements with major companies like Merck KGaA and Janssen/Johnson & Johnson.

data.title: GTI Energy Retracts Lo Herma Uranium Production Targets
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

GTI Resources Ltd ( (AU:GTR) ) has issued an update.

GTI Energy Ltd has retracted its previous production targets and financial forecasts related to its Lo Herma Scoping Study after consultations with the ASX revealed insufficient basis for the forward-looking statements. The company advises investors not to base their decisions on these announcements and is planning a new drilling program to enhance the confidence level in its mineral resource estimates and expand the deposit.

More about GTI Resources Ltd

GTI Energy Ltd operates in the energy sector, focusing on uranium resources. The company is involved in exploring and developing low-cost uranium extraction methods, particularly through in-situ recovery (ISR) techniques.

H.I.S. Co., Ltd. has announced the establishment of a new subsidiary, H.I.S. SAUDI ARABIA LLC, through its consolidated subsidiary, H.I.S. Management Consulting DMCC.
